SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.client

Interface BuildiumClient

All Known Implementing Classes:
BuildiumClientImpl
public interface BuildiumClient
Contract for all interactions with the Buildium property management API. Part of the client package — defines the operations needed by the address pipeline to retrieve rental unit and active-lease data from Buildium. The primary method for pipeline use is fetchActiveLeaseAddresses(), which performs the units-plus-leases join internally and returns typed records. The lower-level getRentalsPage(int, int) and getAllRentals() methods are available for direct rental property listing use cases or for health-check purposes. Implementations must honor the integration.vendor.buildium.enabled flag: when the flag is false, all methods must return empty results without making any outbound HTTP calls.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<BuildiumAddressRecord>
    fetchActiveLeaseAddresses()
    Fetches all active-lease address records by joining the units and leases endpoints.
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    getAllRentals()
    Fetches all rental properties by repeatedly calling getRentalsPage(int, int) until the API returns a partial page.
    List<Map<String,Object>>
    getRentalsPage(int limit, int offset)
    Fetches a single page of rental properties from the Buildium /v1/rentals endpoint.
    boolean
    ping()
    Performs a lightweight connectivity check against the Buildium API.

  • Method Details

    • ping

      boolean ping()
      Performs a lightweight connectivity check against the Buildium API. Attempts to fetch a single page of rentals with a limit of 1. A non-null response is considered a successful ping. Returns false immediately if the integration is disabled.
      Returns:
      true if the Buildium API responded successfully; false otherwise

    • getRentalsPage

      List<Map<String,Object>> getRentalsPage(int limit, int offset)
      Fetches a single page of rental properties from the Buildium /v1/rentals endpoint.
      Parameters:
      limit - maximum number of records to return in this page
      offset - zero-based record offset for pagination
      Returns:
      list of raw property maps as returned by the API; empty list on error or no data

    • getAllRentals

      List<Map<String,Object>> getAllRentals()
      Fetches all rental properties by repeatedly calling getRentalsPage(int, int) until the API returns a partial page.
      Returns:
      complete list of raw property maps; empty list if the integration is disabled or an error occurs

    • fetchActiveLeaseAddresses

      List<BuildiumAddressRecord> fetchActiveLeaseAddresses()
      Fetches all active-lease address records by joining the units and leases endpoints. Performs three internal API calls:
      1. Fetches all rental units (which carry the address data)
      2. Fetches all active leases (which carry the unit-to-lease mapping)
      3. Joins the two result sets on unit ID to produce typed BuildiumAddressRecord objects
      Units without a street address are skipped. Units with no associated active lease still produce a record but with buildiumLeaseId set to null.
      Returns:
      list of address records for all units with a street address; empty list if the integration is disabled or an error occurs
